## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checks

- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks for this change.
- [ ] I have the legal right to submit this code and supporting material.
- [ ] I understand external code contributions require agreement to
      [`CLA.md`](../CLA.md) before merge.
- [ ] I have not added third-party PDFs, copied issue exports, or copied docs
      snapshots to the public repo without clear redistribution rights and
      notice coverage.

## Legal / Notice Impact

- [ ] No license, notice, or provenance files changed.
- [ ] I updated `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` if I added or modified vendored or
      redistributed third-party material.
- [ ] I called out any changes to `LICENSE`, `COMMERCIAL-LICENSING.md`,
      `COPYRIGHT.md`, or `CLA.md` below.

## Notes For Review

Anything reviewers should pay close attention to.
